roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/3000ADM/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #2/3000REIN/PAJ: 70 DAYS/X: WITH TIME LOST/CTORD: PAY RESTITUTION OF $525 DOLLARS TO THE CALIFORNIA/X: DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILITATION FOR THE GPS DEVICE/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 17DAYS,/4019HALF/X: BALANCE OF PETITION IS DISMISSED/ /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLEAGENT,/
